name: card-wave
title: Card Wave
description: A tastefull svg with interactive hover effects to make the boring cards interesting

props.name: defaultHoverIndex
props.description: The index of the wave to hover by default

props.name: numCards
props.description: The number of cards to have in the card wave

props.name: startX
props.description: The starting x position of the wave

props.name: startY
props.description: The starting y position of the wave
